title: Callista aurorosea
taxonomy: Callista aurorosea belongs to the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, order Littorinimorpha, and family Calliidae. It is a species of sea snail that is widely distributed across the Indo-Pacific region. The classification of Callista aurorosea reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its marine environment. The species is further identified through its distinctive shell shape and coloration. This classification is essential for understanding the evolutionary relationships among similar species within the Calliidae family.
